steps.title: Apply the equation from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: Then $8x = 8 \cdot 4 = 32$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Dividing both sides of the given equation $7x=28$ by $7$ yields $x=4$. Substituting $4$ for $x$ in the expression $8x$ yields $8\left(4\right)$, which is equivalent to $32$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $\frac{21}{4}x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $42x$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect. This is the value of $56x$.
